programme.title: Fishing for History
programme.desc: One of the worst engineering failures to ever be captured on film is all Justin and Mike need to plan a visit to Tacoma, Wash.; things get weirder in Olympia when they learn of shanty towns, beer and a rumored ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: As the Nazis rose to power, Himmler and the SS were convinced Atlantis could be found and instigated a series of archeological expeditions determined to uncover and exploit its secrets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Secret Nazi Science
programme.desc: Nazi dreams of an ideal city start to take shape; neighborhoods are slated for demolition; the ideal Aryan city in Linz is designed with temples of art and culture, looted from the downtrodden; what might a Nazi city look like had Hitler succeeded.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: Harboring resentment towards his father, Pasi hopes that traveling with him to native Tonga will provide a way for the two to make peace with their turbulent past.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Female Inventors (Marie Curie, Dian Fossey, Elizabeth Fleischmann)
programme.desc: Breaking the glass ceiling is never easy, but for some female inventors, science comes at an added price.

programme.title: I Died... And Came Back
programme.desc: After a woman decides to push herself to the limit, she comes face-to-face with a difficult choice in the afterlife; a healthy, hardworking man is suddenly struck by a respiratory infection that puts him into a coma and on death's door.

programme.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programme.desc: Between September 1944 and February 1945, US troops fought their longest battle in history, one so punishing soldiers called it "The Meat Grinder" or "Death Factory.".

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: Jordyn and Johnny investigate the Firefighters Museum in Winnipeg, Manitoba; with the help of local investigators, they begin to uncover the long paranormal history of the building; by the time the guys are done, they are convinced.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: Exploring the enduring bond between God and the Jewish people; tracing the roots of the religion from Abraham to today; exploring not only historical events, but also the rich cultural expressions of the Jewish faith.

programme.title: Titans of Defense
programme.desc: The age of drone warfare and autonomous defense is upon us and to carry out remote operations, drones, missiles and defense systems employ game-changing sensors, algorithms and control centres.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: After the Roman conquest of Britannia, many Celtic tribes must submit to Emperor Claudius; Roman soldiers' mistreatment and humiliation of the living monarch sparks fury, and Celtic Queen Boudica ignites an incendiary campaign for vengeance.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Abandoned structures and machinery point to brief human occupations; disturbing noises make researchers explore a global psychological phenomenon; rubber-like slabs emerge on European beaches; a stone pattern is found in the waters of Florida.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: At the sacrificial altar El Castillo, where thousands met their death, researchers find new evidence that could shed light on the Maya; a sacred well at Chichen Itza where thousands were deposited and ceramic pieces at Khonkho Wankane mortuary.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: Jordyn and Johnny investigate the Firefighters Museum in Winnipeg, Manitoba; with the help of local investigators, they begin to uncover the long paranormal history of the building; by the time the guys are done, they are convinced.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: Exploring the enduring bond between God and the Jewish people; tracing the roots of the religion from Abraham to today; exploring not only historical events, but also the rich cultural expressions of the Jewish faith.

programme.title: Titans of Defense
programme.desc: The age of drone warfare and autonomous defense is upon us and to carry out remote operations, drones, missiles and defense systems employ game-changing sensors, algorithms and control centres.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: Fikile and her father, Bangane, travel to his homeland in Zimbabwe for the first time; Bangane teaches Fikile the rich history of their family, while she gains a deeper appreciation for their Ndebele culture.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: Michael and his father, John, travel to Italy together for the first time; despite their sometimes rocky relationship, the two work together to explore the culture that has shaped each of them and may help them reconnect for good.

programme.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programme.desc: Jay finishes at Good Time Games and pivots his phase 2 plans.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: After the Roman conquest of Britannia, many Celtic tribes must submit to Emperor Claudius; Roman soldiers' mistreatment and humiliation of the living monarch sparks fury, and Celtic Queen Boudica ignites an incendiary campaign for vengeance.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Abandoned structures and machinery point to brief human occupations; disturbing noises make researchers explore a global psychological phenomenon; rubber-like slabs emerge on European beaches; a stone pattern is found in the waters of Florida.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: At the sacrificial altar El Castillo, where thousands met their death, researchers find new evidence that could shed light on the Maya; a sacred well at Chichen Itza where thousands were deposited and ceramic pieces at Khonkho Wankane mortuary.

programme.title: Titans of Defense
programme.desc: The age of drone warfare and autonomous defense is upon us and to carry out remote operations, drones, missiles and defense systems employ game-changing sensors, algorithms and control centres.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: After the Roman conquest of Britannia, many Celtic tribes must submit to Emperor Claudius; Roman soldiers' mistreatment and humiliation of the living monarch sparks fury, and Celtic Queen Boudica ignites an incendiary campaign for vengeance.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: Jordyn and Johnny investigate the Firefighters Museum in Winnipeg, Manitoba; with the help of local investigators, they begin to uncover the long paranormal history of the building; by the time the guys are done, they are convinced.

programme.desc: Exploring the enduring bond between God and the Jewish people; tracing the roots of the religion from Abraham to today; exploring not only historical events, but also the rich cultural expressions of the Jewish faith.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Abandoned structures and machinery point to brief human occupations; disturbing noises make researchers explore a global psychological phenomenon; rubber-like slabs emerge on European beaches; a stone pattern is found in the waters of Florida.

programme.desc: At the sacrificial altar El Castillo, where thousands met their death, researchers find new evidence that could shed light on the Maya; a sacred well at Chichen Itza where thousands were deposited and ceramic pieces at Khonkho Wankane mortuary.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Titans of Defense
programme.desc: The age of drone warfare and autonomous defense is upon us and to carry out remote operations, drones, missiles and defense systems employ game-changing sensors, algorithms and control centres.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: Jordyn and Johnny investigate the Firefighters Museum in Winnipeg, Manitoba; with the help of local investigators, they begin to uncover the long paranormal history of the building; by the time the guys are done, they are convinced.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Abandoned structures and machinery point to brief human occupations; disturbing noises make researchers explore a global psychological phenomenon; rubber-like slabs emerge on European beaches; a stone pattern is found in the waters of Florida.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: After an eleven-year estrangement, Jordan and his father, Adonis, have recently reconnected; for the first time, they'll travel to Adonis' home country of Cuba for Jordan to discover their family's rich musical legacy.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: Exploring the enduring bond between God and the Jewish people; tracing the roots of the religion from Abraham to today; exploring not only historical events, but also the rich cultural expressions of the Jewish faith.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: After the Roman conquest of Britannia, many Celtic tribes must submit to Emperor Claudius; Roman soldiers' mistreatment and humiliation of the living monarch sparks fury, and Celtic Queen Boudica ignites an incendiary campaign for vengeance.

programme.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programme.desc: Rob checks out several booths at Game On Expo in Phoenix and finds some unexpected surprises.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Female Inventors (Marie Curie, Dian Fossey, Elizabeth Fleischmann)
programme.desc: Breaking the glass ceiling is never easy, but for some female inventors, science comes at an added price.

programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The United States, United Kingdom and the Soviet Union race to create the first super-weapon; New York City becomes a hotbed of spy games; soviet spies weave intricate legends so they can work deep undercover.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: A grim discovery in a Swedish lake reveals ancient practices; in the Canadian Arctic, the fossil of a previously unknown mammal is found; bizarre ice formations in the Antarctic Ocean; a discovery off the east coast of Canada.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Bodies: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: In the mountains of Northern Italy, a discovery is made by a couple of mountaineers; in a nearly unreachable part of the world, human remains are found sticking out from a glacier; these turn out to be those of the oldest mummified human ever found.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: Washington state holds the nation's highest rates of UFO sightings per-capita, with a new report made every 55 hours; why do UFOs choose to hover there?

programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The United States, United Kingdom and the Soviet Union race to create the first super-weapon; New York City becomes a hotbed of spy games; soviet spies weave intricate legends so they can work deep undercover.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Female Inventors (Marie Curie, Dian Fossey, Elizabeth Fleischmann)
programme.desc: Breaking the glass ceiling is never easy, but for some female inventors, science comes at an added price.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: A grim discovery in a Swedish lake reveals ancient practices; in the Canadian Arctic, the fossil of a previously unknown mammal is found; bizarre ice formations in the Antarctic Ocean; a discovery off the east coast of Canada.

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: Washington state holds the nation's highest rates of UFO sightings per-capita, with a new report made every 55 hours; why do UFOs choose to hover there?

programme.title: Digital Tsunami: Big Tech, Big AI, Big Brother
programme.desc: This documentary will examine how toxic elements of digital environment are dramatically transforming society in negative ways, just as the prophetic, popular futurist Marshall McLuhan predicted 60 years ago. Examining the unforeseen social and political problems caused by the digital revolution, and highlight the need for laws and regulations to protect citizens, especially the most vulnerable.

programme.title: Ancient Bodies: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: In the mountains of Northern Italy, a discovery is made by a couple of mountaineers; in a nearly unreachable part of the world, human remains are found sticking out from a glacier; these turn out to be those of the oldest mummified human ever found.

programme.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programme.desc: Jay visits Game Cycle and is blown away by their huge display of N64 games; but are they willing to wheel and deal at the prices he can afford?
